visualization.description: Count of mandatory vs optional prerequisites
visualization.title: Mandatory vs Optional Prerequisites

resultRaw.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_mandatory = TRUE THEN 'Mandatory' WHEN is_mandatory = FALSE THEN 'Optional' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS prerequisite_kind, COUNT(*) AS prerequisite_count FROM prerequisites GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY prerequisite_count DESC;

visualization.description: Count of mandatory vs optional prerequisites
visualization.title: Mandatory vs Optional Prerequisites

result.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_mandatory = TRUE THEN 'Mandatory' WHEN is_mandatory = FALSE THEN 'Optional' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS prerequisite_kind, COUNT(*) AS prerequisite_count FROM prerequisites GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY prerequisite_count DESC;
